name: query_understanding
prompt: Resolve the user question against the provided document catalog candidates only. Return JSON with keys search_query (string), document_hints (array of strings), selected_catalog_ids (array of catalog_id strings from candidates only), point_number_hints (array of strings), confidence (number 0..1), warnings (array of strings). Do not invent documents outside candidates. If confidence is below 0.55 or candidates are ambiguous, return empty selected_catalog_ids and explain in warnings. Return only one JSON object. No markdown fences, no reasoning text, no prose before or after JSON, no extra keys outside the contract.
